『Burberry』
Burberry's new runway bowling bag reimagined as an exquisite crossbody. Selected smooth Italian leather combined with vintage check, decorated with brand logo embossing, and equipped with a leather-covered lock and key for security. Compact yet spacious, fits 4 phones. Model 8358, 18 x 8 x 11cm.

items.name_en: Burberry TB Small Exclusive Logo Leather Lock Bag, structured leather shoulder bag with smooth texture, featuring a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas exclusive logo. Easily transforms into a crossbody or handbag style. Dimensions: W21 x H16 x D6cm Removable and adjustable leather crossbody strap 1 external slip pocket; 1 zippered interior pocket 2 interior compartments Top flap with lock design Hand-painted edges Glossy metal hardware Made in Italy
items.name_cn: Burberry TB Small Exclusive Logo Leather Lock Bag, structured leather shoulder bag with smooth texture, featuring a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas exclusive logo. items.name_en: 【Burberry】Structured Tote Bag, made from Italian tanned grained leather, featuring a striking glossy Thomas Burberry exclusive logo. items.name_cn:
New
【With Box】Burberry TB bag, featuring a TB monogram lock design. The design is not overly complex, simple yet classic, with just the right capacity, interpreting the blend of modernity and traditional elegance. It fits various daily outfits and has won the love of many celebrity fashion icons!!
Size 21-7-14CM
